climbIndicatorTooltipLoc: ClimbingThis player has just started their climb after the reset. Their visible rank hasn't caught up with their skill.
autofillEnabledTooltipLoc:
Priority RolesOccasionally, you will be auto-assigned a Priority Role for queue health. We will ensure those matches are fair and give you extra rewards if you win.
Role Fairness1. We try to match auto-assigned players by role.
2. If we can't, match the number of auto-assigned players.
Aegis of Valor Rewards Win an autofill game to earn Double LP.
autofillProtectedTooltipLoc:
Playing out an autofilled game will guarantee your role selections for the next few games.

Priority role selections are guaranteed and will occasionally be eligible for an Aegis of Valor.
autofillModalCarryOverDescLoc: You were assigned a priority role, but the game did not start. Play it out and win to earn an Aegis of Valor.
autofillModalDodgingDescLoc: Your priority role assignment will carryover if you leave. Play it out and win to earn an Aegis of Valor.
lpChangeValorAegisIconTooltipBodyLoc: Awarded for winning an autofill game and occasionally for winning on a priority role.
valorAegisPriorityRoleProtectionDesc1: Occasionally awarded for winning on a priority role.
valorAegisPriorityRoleProtectionDesc2: Playing priority roles keeps the queue healthy. Thank you!
valorAegisAutofillProtectionDesc: Awarded for winning an autofill game
